intro: The U.S. government issued an export control directive ordering Anthropic to disable its newly launched Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, citing national security concerns and citing a disputed jailbreak vulnerability—with Amazon's security research reportedly influencing the decision. State attorneys general are investigating OpenAI regarding its ad policies and health data handling practices. Separately, AI developers are increasingly using AI systems to train future models, raising new questions among mental health experts about reliability and oversight.

whitelist.title: AI - Business Insider
whitelist.desc: Explore cutting-edge AI insights and trends with Business Insider's dedicated artificial intelligence coverage. Stay ahead with in-depth articles, expert analyses, and the latest news on AI technologies shaping industries worldwide.

whitelist.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

whitelist.title: Anthropic cuts off Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access following government order
whitelist.desc: The US government issued an export control directive citing national security concerns requiring Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for foreign nationals.

whitelist.title: US orders Anthropic to shut down Fable 5 and Mythos 5
whitelist.desc: Washington forced Anthropic to disable its most powerful AI models over a disputed jailbreak, just three days after launch. Anthropic says the action is disproportionate.

whitelist.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
whitelist.desc: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

whitelist.title: The AI boom is quietly making the office popular again
whitelist.desc: AI startup founders and workplace experts say that the AI industry has a distinct workplace culture that operates on in-person work and mutual trust.

whitelist.title: Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
whitelist.desc: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy spoke with officials about security concerns regarding Anthropic’s Fable 5 shortly before the export control directive.

whitelist.title: Anthropic Pulls Fable, Mythos After Government Issues Emergency Export Control Order
whitelist.desc: The U.S. government ordered Anthropic to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over national security concerns just days after its CEO called for exactly this kind of oversight.

whitelist.title: As AI Begins Building AI, Mental Health Experts Face New Questions
whitelist.desc: AI makers are increasingly relying on AI to improve future models. The approach could transform mental health chatbots—but experts warn the risks remain unclear.

whitelist.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

whitelist.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

whitelist.title: 'It's not a jailbreak' — Research leading to U.S. export restrictions on top Anthropic models was for defense, cybersecurity CEO says | Fortune
whitelist.desc: "It was Defense Oriented Prompting (DOP), capabilities defenders need."

whitelist.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned Mythos posed a national security threat. Washington just responded.
whitelist.desc: Anthropic's Dario Amodei warned his AI model, Mythos, was so powerful it posed serious threats. Then the government stepped in and Anthropic shut it down.

whitelist.title: SpaceX Just Made The AI Infrastructure War Public
whitelist.desc: SpaceX’s IPO wasn’t just about rockets. It was a bet on who controls the physical infrastructure the next AI economy will run on.

whitelist.title: US Government Suspends Access To Claude Fable 5 And Mythos 5 (What It Means For Your Business)
whitelist.desc: The US government just forced Anthropic to suspend Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 overnight. Here is what every business owner building on AI needs to do.

whitelist.title: Flag Day And The Coming Battle Over AI Orthodoxy
whitelist.desc: The flag is a symbol of the Rule of Law that may be challenged by AI.

whitelist.title: The Moral Of Anthropic’s Fable: Model Access Is Power
whitelist.desc: Coming just three days after its launch, the sudden block of Anthropic's Fable model has become a larger fight over who decides when an AI system is too powerful for open access.

whitelist.title: My first 24 hours with Siri AI on the Mac

whitelist.title: 42 state AGs probe OpenAI days after IPO filing
whitelist.desc: A coalition of 42 state attorneys general is investigating OpenAI over user safety, data practices, and child protection, days after the company filed confidentially for its IPO.

whitelist.title: OpenAI Buys Ona To Run Codex Agents Inside Enterprise Clouds
whitelist.desc: OpenAI is acquiring Ona, formerly Gitpod, to run Codex agents inside a customer's own cloud. The coding-agent race is shifting from model quality to the execution layer.

whitelist.desc: Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

whitelist.desc: “The government believes it has become aware of a method of bypassing, or ‘jailbreaking’ Fable 5,” the company said in a blog post.

whitelist.desc: The Wall Street Journal reported that a coalition of state attorneys general have opened an investigation into OpenAI.

whitelist.title: AI Is Coming for Jobs. The Question Is Whether Governments Are Paying Attention.
whitelist.desc: Entrepreneur Marco Riedesser has spent his career building automation systems, which is precisely why his views on AI and jobs stand out. In a conversation that moves from coding and robotics to universal income and purpose, he argues that the real challenge may not be AI itself, but whether society is prepared for how work could change.

whitelist.title: SpaceX is now a public company valued for its AI potential, so what comes next?

longtail.title: Anthropic cuts access to AI models over US 'national security' order
longtail.desc: Anthropic said Friday it has suspended access to two powerful AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, to comply with a US national security order. Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals, even ones who work at Anthropic, from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5 over national security concerns.
